scale.h1: text-6xl md:text-8xl font-medium tracking-tight font-secondary uppercase
scale.h2: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-semibold tracking-tight font-secondary uppercase
scale.label: text-xs font-mono tracking-widest text-slate-500 uppercase

layout.glass_panel: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-xl shadow-2xl

buttons.primary: bg-cyan-500 text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-cyan-400 transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,240,255,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(0,240,255,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-cyan-400 hover:text-cyan-400 uppercase tracking-widest transition-all

cards.feature: group relative p-8 rounded-2xl bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 border border-white/5 hover:border-cyan-500/50 transition-all duration-500 overflow-hidden
cards.orbit_stat: flex flex-col gap-1 p-4 rounded-lg bg-black/60 border-l-2 border-cyan-500 backdrop-blur-md

inputs.select: bg-black/50 border-white/10 text-white focus:border-cyan-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan-500

instructions_to_main_agent.general: You are building a high-fidelity 3D educational platform. Do not compromise on visual quality. Use R3F for all 3D elements. The UI must float above the 3D scene like a HUD.
instructions_to_main_agent.orbit_logic: Implement accurate orbital mechanics logic (Keplerian elements). Allow users to adjust semi-major axis, eccentricity, inclination, etc., and see the orbit update in real-time.
instructions_to_main_agent.gamification: Create a 'Mission Control' dashboard where users track their points. Unlocking orbits should feel like a major achievement with sound effects (optional) and visual flair.
instructions_to_main_agent.responsiveness: The 3D scene must resize correctly. On mobile, simplify the controls but keep the 3D interactive.
instructions_to_main_agent.performance: Use `useFrame` sparingly for logic. Memoize heavy calculations. Use `instancedMesh` if rendering many objects (like debris).
instructions_to_main_agent.assets: Use the provided Texture URLs for the Earth material. If they fail to load, fallback to a wireframe blue earth or a simple color sphere.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Avoid this.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: `transition: all`. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors: separates good from extraordinary.
